name: Chocolate Walnut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 egg, PLUS enough water to equal 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons
2 1/4 cups Gold Medal Better for Bread Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure carefully, placing all ingredients in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Select Sweet of Basic/White cycle. Use Medium or Light crust setting.
3. Push start.
4. Do not use a delay cycle for this recipe as it contains perishable ingredients.
